creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi! There are some problems with this port: 

*) => Attempting to fetch from http://sk1project.org/downloads/sk1/. 
fetch: http://sk1project.org/downloads/sk1/sK1-0.9.0-rev361.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1133704, actual 1109653 

*) Please don't use PORTREVISION for vendor version control, use instead 
something like 
DISTVERSION=0.9.0-rev365 
and you can remove DISTNAME and EXTRACT_SUFX declarations 

*) Dependency list looks wrong. Please use USE_TK, USE_XORG, USE_GETTEXT 
defines where appropriate.
